Created attachment 171769
iohyve-0.7.6-diff

I understand a diff in BugZilla is required for updating ports in the tree. This is my first time going this route, please let me know if I should change anything this time around or in the future. Thank you. 

Attached is the diff for upgrading iohyve to v0.7.6 in ports after it's move into shell libraries.
